title: Identification vs Verification
html: Stub. Verification = "are you who you claim to be?" (1:1 match against a claimed identity). Identification = "who are you?" (1:N match against a database). Identification scales much worse than verification in both speed and accuracy — see fmr fnmr tradeoff. First mentioned in 2025 04 27 biometrics fmr fnmr cost benefit.
